mapper.sql: CASE r.target_type WHEN 0 THEN 'USER' WHEN 1 THEN 'TASK' WHEN 2 THEN 'ORDER' WHEN 3 THEN 'POST' ELSE 'COMMENT' END
CASE r.status WHEN 0 THEN 'PENDING' WHEN 1 THEN 'HANDLED' ELSE 'REJECTED' END

SELECT r.id AS reportId, reporter.id AS reporterId, reporter.nickname AS reporterName, target.id AS targetUserId, target.nickname AS targetUserName, handler.id AS handlerId, handler.nickname AS handlerName, r.task_id AS taskId, r.order_id AS orderId, r.post_id AS postId, r.comment_id AS commentId, AS targetType, r.target_id AS targetId, r.reason, AS status, r.result, r.create_time AS createdAt, r.update_time AS updatedAt FROM t_report r JOIN u_user reporter ON reporter.id = r.reporter_id AND reporter.is_deleted = false JOIN u_user target ON target.id = r.target_user_id AND target.is_deleted = false LEFT JOIN u_user handler ON handler.id = r.handler_id AND handler.is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_report ( reporter_id, target_user_id, task_id, order_id, post_id, comment_id, target_type, target_id, reason, status ) VALUES ( #{reporterId}, #{targetUserId}, #{taskId}, #{orderId}, #{postId}, #{commentId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reason}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, reporter_id, target_user_id, handler_id, task_id, order_id, post_id, comment_id, target_type, target_id, reason, status, result, create_time, update_time FROM t_report WHERE id = #{reportId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_report SET handler_id = #{handlerId}, status = #{status}, result = #{result}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{reportId} AND status = 0
